title: Sneak Utils
description: Allows for different sneaking configurations per world/server.
body: Looking for a Minecraft server? Purchasing through the link below directly supports me! # Minecraft Sneak Utils Some sneaky stuff ;)\ Allows for different sneaking configurations per world/server. ## Dependencies - [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (optional, required to change settings in-game) ## Features - Legacy sneak support (sneak like before 1.13) - Toggle for staying in block corners - Supports different camera interpolation modes - Different configurations per world/server ## Special thanks - Arcayn (German translation and default step function) - ItzTacos (Italian translation) ## Preview ![preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheGameratorT/McSneakUtils/main/src-img/preview.jpg) **Sneak Utils is a mod for Fabric, and there are no plans to port this mod to Forge.**
